title: Section 8
content: (1) In computing, under the Limitation Act, 1963 (36 of 1963) or any other law for the time being in force, the period of limitation for the purpose of instituting a suit or other proceeding for the enforcement of a claim, any period after the date on which such claim is registered under, and in accordance with, the provisions of the Scheme shall be excluded. (2) Nothing in sub-section (1) shall apply to any proceedings by way of appeal.
